item.title: HowToLearn
item.author: creepey
item.description: Have you ever paly Minecraft or other games.When you are palying them，you must have one sence that your time fly.We paly them with our all attentions, and never tired.In my opinion,if we know the underlying logic,learning skills is something similar to playing games which is interestng and appealing. The way to achieve real world goals is similar to mincraft crafting recipes.Everyone has its specific achieving goals methods.As a result.you need to create the recipe suitable for you with the help of mind map.
